## Source: ghsa-malware (53680bca467e1e6f54c9b55d2cd1d558a5f6ee17dc5613c0f72a1043859363be)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (5fcb11aea794afd6b87c58dee41958584041b8638848807223b0633a851e3ad1)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'github-kv' @ 0.0.1.rdbd1267 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
